description: This pie chart is fundamentally misleading because it shows only the top 5 sub-categories but displays their percentages relative to all 8 categories, making the slices appear to represent parts of a whole when they actually sum to only about 71% of the total. This creates the false impression that these 5 categories constitute the entire sales picture, when in reality 29% of sales are missing from the visualization.
